name: open_damos — EDC16CP33 Bosch (seed)
description: SEED recipe for Bosch EDC16CP33 (Renault 2.0 dCi M9R and family). Bootstrapped from a WinOLS .ols project: the ROM was extracted with ecu::olsExtractRom and AccPed_trqPrp_MAP was located + verified by fingerprint relocation (score 1.00) against that ROM. Only fingerprint-confirmed entries are included — the remaining Stage 1 maps await a CP33-specific DAMOS/A2L (the 2.0 dCi axis breakpoints differ too much from the EDC16C34 1.6 HDi reference to transfer its fingerprints, and the OLS 5.x record→address layout is not reverse-engineered). Big-endian like all Bosch EDC16.

baseline.damos: (embedded in the .ols WinOLS project — labels present, addresses not resolved from OLS5)
baseline.note: ROM extracted via ecu::olsExtractRom (eprom block 0x1EE000 = 2023424 bytes). Fingerprints below are the raw axis values read in that extracted ROM at the resolved address. defaultAddress is the offset within the extracted ROM image.

characteristics.name: AccPed_trqPrp_MAP
characteristics.description: Driver's wish PROPULSION — torque requested for the mastershift (auto/semi-auto gearbox). 16×16 vs VSSCD_v (vehicle speed) and AccPed_rChkdVal (pedal). Located + verified by fingerprint relocation on the extracted CP33 ROM (score 1.00).
